title: Interruption that starts with a filler (um, actually...)

transcript.agent: I have you down for the two bedroom suite with the late checkout option and the...
transcript.caller: um, actually, can we make that a one bedroom instead

why_it_matters: This is a real floor-take that opens with a disfluency. Detectors that gate on a minimum number of words or a minimum speech duration often drop the leading um and either yield late or not at all. The correct behavior is to yield to the whole interruption, filler included.
